zh.Ashwell, Rutland, England: 英國盧特藍德阿申維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Touchet於1218年出生在英國盧特藍德阿申維爾時，他的父親Thomas Touchet26歲，母親Elizabeth or Isabel d’Apleby23歲。他於大約1243年與Eva d’Apleby在英國英格蘭爾特利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1248年10月13日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾享年30歲。

zh-hans.Ashwell, Rutland, England: 英国盧特藍德阿申維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Touchet于1218年出生在英国盧特藍德阿申維爾时，他的父亲Thomas Touchet26岁，母亲Elizabeth or Isabel d’Apleby23岁。他于大约1243年与Eva d’Apleby在英国英格兰爾特利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1248年10月13日在英国英格兰史洛普爾享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Touchet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anastasie, Denys, Evest, Minos, Rodolph, Vernice.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by a small grove, from a diminutive of Old French toche ‘grove’.
History: René Touchet from Thorigné-d'Anjou in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Caillé in Saint-Laurent, Île-de-Montreal, QC, in 1746.

variants.name: Touchette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Armand, Collette, Euclide, Henri, Hilaire, Huguette.
Altered form of French Touchet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Touchet was born in 1218, in Ashwell, Rutland, England, his father, Thomas Touchet, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth or Isabel d’Apleby, was 23. He married Eva d’Apleby about 1243, in Whitley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 October 1248, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Touchet est né en 1218, à Ashwell, Rutland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Touchet, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth or Isabel d’Apleby, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Eva d’Apleby environ 1243, à Whitley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1248, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Touchet 1218 in Ashwell, Rutland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Touchet 26 und seine Mutter Elizabeth or Isabel d’Apleby 23. Er hat um 1243 in Whitley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Eva d’Apleby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Oktober 1248 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Touchet è nato il nel 1218 nel Ashwell, Rutland, England, il suo padre, Thomas Touchet, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth or Isabel d’Apleby, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Eva d’Apleby circa 1243, nel Whitley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 ottobre 1248, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Touchetが1218年にイギリスルトランドアシュウエルで生まれた時，父Thomas Touchetは26歳，母Elizabeth or Isabel d’Aplebyは23歳であった。約1243年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウィトリーでEva d’Aplebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1248年10月13日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Touchet(이)가 1218년 영국 루틀랜드 애슈웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Touchet(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth or Isabel d’Apleby(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1243년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 휘틀리에서 Eva d’Apleby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1248년 10월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Touchet nasceu em 1218, em Ashwell, Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Touchet, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth or Isabel d’Apleby, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Eva d’Apleby aproximadamente 1243, em Whitley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1248, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Touchet родился в 1218 г. в местности ашвелл, рутланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Touchet было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth or Isabel d’Apleby, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva d’Apleby около 1243 г. в местности уитли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 октября 1248 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Touchet nació en 1218, en Ashwell, Rutland, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Touchet, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth or Isabel d’Apleby, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Eva d’Apleby aproximadamente 1243, en Whitley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1248, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años.
